user.title: ioBroker – Connection
user.description:
Connect to your ioBroker instance.

**Required:** The [simple-api adapter](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.simple-api) must be installed and running inside ioBroker (Adapters → simple-api). It listens on port **8087** by default.

categories.title: ioBroker – Data categories
categories.description:
Select which ioBroker data categories should be imported as Home Assistant entities.

| Category | ioBroker prefix | Typical use |
|---|---|---|
| System data | `system.*` | Core ioBroker system states |
| Admin | `admin.*` | Admin adapter states |
| User data | `0_userdata.*` | Custom user-defined states |
| Devices | *(all others)* | All connected device adapters |
| Discovery | `discovery.*` | Discovery adapter states |
| Simple-API | `simple-api.*` | Simple-API adapter states |
| Hass | `hass.*` | Hass adapter states |

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Verify the hostname/IP and port, and make sure the **simple-api adapter** is installed and running in ioBroker (Adapters → simple-api, default port 8087).
error.invalid_host: Invalid hostname. Check for consecutive dots, leading or trailing dots.

abort.already_configured: This ioBroker instance is already configured.
